[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010000000 1
1 001010000 2
2 001001011 4
3 100111011 6
4 111011011 7
5 101100100 4
6 111001101 6
7 101100101 5
